record.title: Oscar Johnson, 1976-10-01, Interview - MP3 Recording
record.subject: Latah County -- Idaho
record.occupation: Worked at firebrick plant for forty years
record.origin: Came with father from Sweden in 1910
record.keywords: banks farming death families immigrants foremen schools childbirth Great Depression

point.title: Brief description of his life; worked at the brick plant, now "cuspidorian" at the bank
point.synopsis: A thumbnail sketch of his life. He worked forty years at the brick plant, is now "cuspidorian" at the bank. Father's brother August gave up farming but encouraged him to come; without equipment, that was the hardest work father did. Farm in Sweden; father's first wife's death. Father's discontentment - he returned to Sweden and again to America.

point.title: Father's purchase of brickyard and bank stock; loaned money privately; Troy bank; gradual improvement of conditions
point.synopsis: Father's purchase of brickyard stock and bank stock. He also loaned money privately. Ole Bohman loaned money to Oscar with his face for security. Troy town fathers. Troy bank may have survived in part because of town industry. Father's concern about dividends. Gradual improvement of conditions. To be foreman meant more responsibility and grief; father's hard work.

point.title: Firebrick from the plant; cheapness of management
point.synopsis: Firebrick from the plant. Cheapness of management no money for nails. A mining company made an impractical tunnel to get the clay. Beginning of the fire brick company; some of its history.

point.title: Making bricks
point.synopsis: Making bricks. Long hours; need for work. Cut in wages after war.

point.title: Early Troy
point.synopsis: Early Troy. Logs under Main Street. Swedish school - after a while young people no longer spoke it

point.title: Hays shot by Payne Sly, who would always be haunted by the memory
point.synopsis: Hays shot by Payne Sly, who would always be haunted by the memory.

point.title: Paying doctor for birth of first child in depression; Help in the depression
point.synopsis: Paying doctor for birth of first child in depression. Help in the depression.

record.description: Work for firebrick company. Early Troy. Father's life 10-1-76 .7 hr
record.transcript: Download the PDF Index No transcript available.
